note: Perturbation kind 6: is brittleness English-specific? The misspelling/wording/article ladder rerun in Hindi. Anchors chosen for a strong Hindi attractor: flower (गुलाब ~93%) and color. Typos are safe, extremely-common variants -- फूल->फुल (long-u to short-u), रंग->रँग (anusvara to chandrabindu). VALIDATE before the full run: confirm control gives गुलाब/नीला and the typo is still understood. Urdu follows once Hindi checks out. Scene id = <anchor>_<condition>; analyze with the Hindi normalizer.
